summary: Read-only R6 review for Observatory/observability UI/audit log/trust score lens. Inspected MEMORY.md DinoBrain entries, OS remaining-gaps plan, completion conditions, RAG OS consensus, package scripts, Observatory server/UI, health status, memory audit, verify-observatory, verify-goal, and current state artifacts. Verdict: REVISE_REQUIRED because the docs name the right Observatory conditions, but implementation and verification do not yet prove app-visible health/client MCP parity, blocker lanes, reviewer/main/verifier pending lanes, invalid status artifact degradation, or full provided/declared/observed memory-use visibility in the UI.
decisions: Current request superseded prior R6 source-lineage recheck.
Verdict is REVISE_REQUIRED for Observatory/UI/audit/trust-score lens.

The completion conditions should explicitly require app-visible provided/declared/observed memory paths and lane-level blocker/pending taxonomy, and verify-goal should include an Observatory evidence verifier or equivalent.
next_steps: Add or wire verify:observatory-evidence into package scripts and verify:goal.
Make /api/state expose health_status and client_mcp_direct_status.agents[] directly, or document an equivalent object and verify it.
Strengthen Observatory UI/browser verification for blocker lane, reviewer/main/verifier pending lanes, memory audit trust score, and provided/declared/observed memory lists.
Treat invalid/unreadable JSON status artifacts as explicit degraded/blocker states instead of silent null/missing.
search_queries: MEMORY.md DinoBrain Observatory trust audit pending blocked
Observatory /api/state health_status client_mcp_direct_status pending blocker trust
